context: Tests whether the agent structures the checkout page with collapsible contact/shipping/payment sections driven by completedSteps and activeStep state, includes a responsive sticky order summary, keeps the order summary visible at all times, persists multi-step data to sessionStorage, and ensures keyboard accessibility for expanding/collapsing sections.

checklist.name: Three-step STEPS array
checklist.description: The checkout steps are defined as an ordered collection (array or equivalent) containing exactly the three steps: contact, shipping, and payment — in that order

checklist.name: completedSteps state
checklist.description: A completedSteps Set (or equivalent) tracks which steps the user has finished; a step is added to it when that step is submitted/completed

checklist.name: activeStep state
checklist.description: An activeStep string (or equivalent) tracks which section is currently expanded; it advances automatically to the next step after completion

checklist.name: isLocked prop logic
checklist.description: Sections are locked (not editable/expandable) until their prerequisite step is completed — e.g. shipping is locked until contact is done

checklist.name: Order summary always visible
checklist.description: The order summary component is rendered on every step of the checkout and is NOT conditionally hidden or removed at any step

checklist.name: Sticky order summary
checklist.description: The order summary panel has position: sticky (or equivalent) applied so it stays in view as the user scrolls through the form

checklist.name: Responsive two-column layout
checklist.description: On viewports 768px and wider the layout uses a two-column grid with a 380px summary column; on smaller screens it is single-column

checklist.name: sessionStorage step data
checklist.description: Each completed step's form data is saved to sessionStorage and restored when the user navigates back to that step

checklist.name: Keyboard expand/collapse
checklist.description: Collapsible checkout sections can be expanded or collapsed using keyboard interaction (Enter or Space key) in addition to mouse click

checklist.name: Progress indicator
checklist.description: A checkout progress indicator (e.g. step numbers, labels, or completed checkmarks) is displayed, reflecting the current activeStep and completedSteps

checklist.name: Mobile single-column layout
checklist.description: On mobile (below 768px breakpoint) the layout collapses to a single column with the summary not sticky or stacked below/above the form
